creator: inbox@alleghenycomputer.com
text:
Sorry, for all the replies but I thought of one more thing that might help... these systems were all installed clean with FreeBSD12 (no upgrade from 11, etc.)

They are all currently running FreeBSD 12.0-RELEASE-p3 amd64

So far Python has been brought in as a depencey - meaning I have made no changes to it or it's default settings.  I have run into no trouble with it since FreeBSD 12 came out (well... until now) and I typically update weekly.

I hope some of this info helps rule some things either in or out...
